text.title: Extreme Programming Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Extreme Programming end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: make-ci-fast
step.action: Optimise to <=10 minutes; parallel jobs + cache + sharding.

step.name: introduce-tdd
step.action: Adopt red-green-refactor on new code; existing code gradual.
step.decision-gate: Reject coding without tests on hot path.

step.name: switch-to-trunk
step.action: Short-lived branches (<3d); merge daily; feature flags for incomplete work.

step.name: wire-pairing
step.action: Pair programming on >=50% of code; rotate every <=2 days; AI-pair for solos.
